prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低录取位次分别为约3728名、4070名、10801名、8928名、20928名，整体呈大幅波动后移趋势。2023年位次从4000名级别骤降至10801名，2 024年短暂回升至8928名，但2025年进一步下滑至20928名，近两年累计后移约12000名，反映出该校在物理类考生中的吸引力持续减弱；该校在辽宁省物理类招 生计划2021年30人、2022年29人、2023年29人、2024年39人、2025年43人，呈逐年扩招趋势。2026年计划43人，与2025年持平，未进一步扩招，招生规模稳定对位次有一定 支撑作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科2026年主榜排名第66位，近年排名稳定在65–76区间，属于全国中上水平的财经类顶尖院校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校预约入校政策等管理回应，无重大负面舆情。抖音热度排名第92位，评价为一般，综合热度约19.3万，短视频平台关注度 处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显的报考热度信号；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A+（全国顶尖），工商管理获评A，统计学获评A-。三个A类学科覆盖了该 校绝大部分招生专业，学科实力在财经类院校中位居前列，对高分考生仍具较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业在2024年专业热度评估中为"分化观望"， 热度指数65.49，推荐率约61.5%，较前几年有所降温。物理类考生总数2026年估算约146800人，较2025年143368人小幅增加约2.4%，竞争略有加剧。；西南财经大学位于四川省成都市，属于西南地区，对于辽宁省考生而言属于跨省求学。该校在辽宁省的招生计划占比较小（约43人），属于省外招生规模适中 的院校，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、物理类考生总数小幅增加以及财经类专业热度分化等因素，预计 2026年物理类录取位次将较2025年有所回升。主要考量：物理类考生增加使竞争加剧，但该校2025年位次已处于历史低位，继续大幅下滑空间有限；招生计划稳定对位次形成支撑；学校学科实力强劲（应用经济学A+）对考生仍有吸引力。预测2026年最低录取位次约20628名，区间20128–21128名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3728, 4070, 10801, 8928, and 20928 respectively, showing a significant fluctuating and backward trend. In 2023, the ranking dropped sharply from the 4000 level to 10801, briefly rebounded to 8928 in 2024, but further declined to 20928 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12000 positions in the past two years, reflecting the university's continuously weakening appeal among Physics Category candidates. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 30 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 43 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 43, unchanged from 2025, with no further expansion, and the stable enrollment scale provides some support for rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 65–76 range in recent years, belonging to the national upper-middle level top finance and economics institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving management responses such as the university's appointment-based entry policy, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd, rated as average, with a comprehensive popularity of about 193,000, indicating a below-average level of attention on short video platforms, without obvious application enthusiasm signals. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A+ (national top), Business Administration was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-. These three A-level disciplines cover the vast majority of the university's enrollment majors, with discipline strength ranking among the top in finance and economics institutions, still strongly attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Accounting/Economics majors were rated as 'divergent and wait-and-see' in the 2024 major popularity assessment, with a popularity index of 65.49 and a recommendation rate of about 61.5%, showing some cooling compared to previous years. The total number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is estimated to be about 146,800, a slight increase of about 2.4% from 143,368 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, in the southwestern region, which is a cross-province study destination for Liaoning candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Liaoning Province accounts for a relatively small proportion (about 43 people), making it a moderately sized out-of-province enrollment institution, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan compared to 2025, the slight increase in the total number of Physics Category candidates, and the divergence in popularity of finance and economics majors, it is expected that the 2026 Physics Category admission ranking will rebound compared to 2025. Main considerations: The increase in Physics Category candidates intensifies competition, but the 2025 ranking is already at a historical low, with limited room for further significant decline; the stable enrollment plan supports the ranking; the university's strong discipline strength (Applied Economics A+) remains attractive to candidates. The predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is approximately 20628, with a range of 20128–21128.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for History Category were approximately 625, 738, 897, 1356, and 1834, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1209 places over 5 years. In the recent 3 years (2023–2025), it shifted from 897 to 1834, with an average annual backward shift of about 312 places, indicating an accelerated pace. The enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province was 18 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 23 in 2024, 19 in 2025, and 19 in 2026 (§ 7), unchanged from 2025. The enrollment scale is stable, with no signals of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the upper-middle level among top finance and economics institutions nationwide, with strong appeal to liberal arts candidates. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. It ranks 92nd in Douyin popularity, rated as average, with a comprehensive popularity of about 193,000, indicating below-average attention on short video platforms and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. Applied Economics is rated A+ (top nationally), Business Administration is rated A, and Statistics is rated A-. The History Category majors mainly correspond to Applied Economics and Business Administration, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Accounting/Economics majors were rated as 'divergent and wait-and-see' in the 2024 major popularity assessment, with a popularity index of 65.49, significantly cooling from 72.42 in 2021. The total number of History Category candidates in 2026 is estimated at about 53,200, a decrease of about 5.5% from 56,324 in 2025, indicating reduced competition. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, in the southwestern region, requiring cross-province study. Its enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning is about 19, a small scale, with limited impact of regional preference on application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the decrease in total History Category candidates (reduced competition), and the divergence in popularity of finance and economics majors, it is expected that the admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward. Main considerations: The decrease in History Category candidates alleviates competitive pressure, but the ranking has been shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with strong inertia; the divergence in popularity of finance and economics majors somewhat suppresses application enthusiasm; the university's strong disciplinary strength still attracts candidates. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 1854, with a range of 1520–2188.
